notes: Case found out of order. Complaint of TE Warren E. Gardner vs. North Georgia Presbytery docketed in 2002 but was determined to be procedurally defective. Marked as 'found out of order' alongside cases 2002-05, 2002-07, 2002-08, 2002-13, 2002-15, and 2002-18 per SJC report p. 93.
